title: deschampsia australis subsp. nubigena
intro: Deschampsia australis subsp. nubigena is a sub-species of the alpine hair grass, a type of flowering plant native to New Zealand. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine, primarily for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Deschampsia australis subsp. nubigena include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and provide antimicrobial protection against infections. Herbal preparations of this plant can be found in the form of teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to fully understand its medicinal properties and potential applications.
